reviews.review_description: Love who cares if deo not track movements it such cool app.i love it.
There's literally nothing to do. It doesn't even track your moves. And the graphics are not good.
Very clunky and pixelated scenes. Not really engaging.

The app has potential. I like the backgrounds. I like the yoga instructors. The yoga instructors need to mirror the movements so that I can mirror the yoga instructor . Some of the intermediate movements are actually advanced like The balancing toe hold is an advanced movement.

Her positions don't match the dialogue, so it's sometimes hard to follow, especially when I want to see if my form is correct. I just have to assume I'm doing ok. I'm wondering if the developer has any plans to update it. I see the other reviews reflect mine. It could be a really great app.
I installed it and can’t get past the screen where you choose yoga or meditation. I guess it isn’t working. I’ll change or add to this if there’s an update. Thanks!
Currently does not work for me, but looks to have potential from what I’ve seen.

reviews.review_title: Difficult to do yoga with controllers.
reviews.review_description: Maybe the developers could have put more thoughts on this app. However, given that it is free, it is understandable.
I had trouble following since the verbal instructions were not synched with the image of what the instructor was doing.
